summary: Pre-release production readiness update after P0 hardening. Frontend static, dependency, audit, and Expo health gates pass. Backend pytest and real-device push validation remain blocked by local environment/device availability.

completed_gates.evidence: Clean install completed with 961 packages installed.
0 vulnerabilities after safe PostCSS override and Expo-compatible patch updates.
Dependencies are up to date for Expo SDK 54.

blocked_gates.blocker: No installed Python runtime found on this workstation.
blocked_gates.required_next_step: Install Python 3.11+ or run pytest in CI, then execute backend/tests with Supabase test env configured.

blocked_gates.blocker: No committed E2E automation harness exists for the full mobile app surface; manual/device coverage is still required.
blocked_gates.required_next_step: Run structured manual or automated regression covering all P0 flows listed in this report.

blocked_gates.blocker: Physical Android and iOS devices plus production-like Expo preview builds are required.
blocked_gates.required_next_step: Build preview artifacts, install them on real devices, and record push delivery results.

p0_regression_matrix.flow: Shopping quantity, bought, linked expense, unbought
Borrow, edit borrow, repay, member balance
Recurring bill create/delete and payment linking
Invite second user and accept invite
p0_regression_matrix.reason: Backend pytest blocked locally; full app invite requires E2E/manual session.

p0_regression_matrix.flow: Realtime refresh for expenses, shopping, bills, payments, savings

production_decision: Do not mark production ready until backend pytest, full app regression, and Android/iOS real-device push validation pass.
